pages.title: About Janet - Janet Daby for Lewisham East
pages.text_excerpt: About Janet - Janet Daby for Lewisham East Skip to main content About Janet News In Parliament Policy Enquiries Animal Welfare Business & Trade Culture, Media & Sport Economy Education Employment & Social Security Energy & Climate Change Environment & Farming Health & Social Care Home Affairs & Justice Housing & Local Government International Affairs & Defence Transport Women & Equalities Other Policy Enquiries Contact Me APPG on Children in Police Custody Officers and Members Minutes APPG Inquiry More Menu About Janet Janet Daby talking to a local resident My first involvement in politics came in 2010 when I was elected as a Councillor for Whitefoot ward in Lewisham East. In 2012, I was promoted to the Cabinet as the lead for community safety and served as Deputy Mayor of Lewisham in 2018. As an experienced campaigner, I fought against the closure of Lewisham A&E and worked with Lewisham Council to take legal action against the Liberal Democrat-Conservative Coalition Government. I worked with the Council and housing developers to bring forward plans to build new homes with the support of local residents on the Excalibur Estate. I have campaigned to protect local nursery services, to create a strategy to prevent violence against women and girls, and to work with community safety partners to prevent and reduce crime. I am a passionate champion of our children and young people. From September 2023 I have served as the Shadow Spokesperson for Youth Justice where I have worked to restore trust and to build a more effective justice system for children and young people. Protecting our environment, tackling climate change and poor air quality, reducing poverty and addressing the impacts of the cost-of-living crisis are just some of my priorities in Parliament. Our country has so much untapped potential, and I believe passionately in building a better Britain which is fairer and greener. From Lee to Catford to Downham, Lewisham East is home to many people, families, communities, and cultures living side-by-side as one. Our diversity is our strength. It gives me great pride to work for everyone in Lewisham East. If you need my assistance on urgent casework please click below to find out how you can contact me. Contact details Email: janet.daby.mp@parliament.uk Further details Promoted by Hollie Ridley on behalf of the Labour Party, 20 Rushworth Street, London SE1 0SS ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved. pages.title: Contact Me - Janet Daby for Lewisham East
pages.text_excerpt: Contact Me - Janet Daby for Lewisham East Skip to main content About Janet News In Parliament Policy Enquiries Animal Welfare Business & Trade Culture, Media & Sport Economy Education Employment & Social Security Energy & Climate Change Environment & Farming Health & Social Care Home Affairs & Justice Housing & Local Government International Affairs & Defence Transport Women & Equalities Other Policy Enquiries Contact Me APPG on Children in Police Custody Officers and Members Minutes APPG Inquiry More Menu Contact Me Janet speaks to a Lewisham East resident If you are a resident of Lewisham East and you need to contact me, then please use the details below. In case you are not sure if you resident of Lewisham East, then please enter your details into this website here: https://members.parliament.uk/members/Commons Please remember to include your full name, address and telephone number (where appropriate) also include any relevant reference numbers. These details will improve the efficiency in the handling of your case. Email : janet.daby.mp@parliament.uk Telephone: 0208 4614 733 Surgery Dates for casework are by appointment only – Please email janet.daby.mp@parliament.uk with an overview of your case. Useful Lewisham Council Contacts: For Housing enquiries please redirect your email to: Housingenquiries@lewisham.gov.uk To make a complaint please email: CustomerRelations@lewisham.gov.uk For Housing complaints and feedback please email: HousingComplaintsandFeedback@lewisham.gov.uk For Tenant media enquiries please email: Media.Relationship@lewisham.gov.uk To report or chase a repair please email: lhrepairs@lewisham.gov.uk For enquiries regarding Major Works please email: MajorWorks@lewisham.gov.uk For Estates Environment queries please email: Estates@lewisham.gov.uk Contact details Email: janet.daby.mp@parliament.uk Further details Promoted by Hollie Ridley on behalf of the Labour Party, 20 Rushworth Street, London SE1 0SS ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved.
